codes.term: Neovascular glaucoma due to diabetes mellitus type 2 (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neovascular glaucoma is a complication of diabetes, not an instance of diabetes itself; term does not name the primary condition.

codes.term: Neovascular glaucoma due to diabetes mellitus type 1 (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neovascular glaucoma is a complication of diabetes, not an instance of diabetes itself; term does not name the primary condition.

codes.term: Peripheral angiopathy due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Peripheral angiopathy is a complication of diabetes, not an instance of diabetes itself; term does not name the primary condition.

codes.term: Multiple complications due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
codes.rationale: Multiple complications due to type 2 diabetes represents complications, not an instance of diabetes itself.

codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus with gangrene
codes.rationale: Type 2 diabetes with gangrene represents a complication (gangrene) of diabetes, not diabetes itself.

codes.term: Neuropathic arthropathy due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neuropathic arthropathy is a complication of diabetes, not an instance of diabetes itself; term does not name the primary condition.
Mononeuropathy is a complication of diabetes, not an instance of diabetes itself; term does not name the primary condition.

codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus with ulcer (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type 1 diabetes with ulcer represents a complication (ulcer) of diabetes, not diabetes itself; term does not name the primary condition as the focus.

codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus with ulcer (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type 2 diabetes with ulcer represents a complication (ulcer) of diabetes, not diabetes itself; term does not name the primary condition as the focus.

codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus maturity onset (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type I diabetes maturity onset is ambiguous—maturity onset typically refers to type 2; clinical judgment needed on whether this is a valid subtype or misclassification.

summary: Recall: 70.9% (61 of 86 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 95.3%. F1: 81.3%. 11 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: This is the generic parent code for diabetes mellitus disorder and directly represents the queried condition.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus type 2 (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 2 diabetes mellitus is a primary subtype of diabetes mellitus and is a core code for this condition list.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus type 1 (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 1 diabetes mellitus is a primary subtype of diabetes mellitus and is a core code for this condition list.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus without complication (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Direct instance of diabetes mellitus without complication; core diagnostic code for the condition.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus type 2 without retinopathy (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 2 diabetes mellitus without retinopathy is a direct instance of type 2 diabetes with a specified complication status.

scored_codes.term: Insulin treated type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Insulin-treated type 2 diabetes mellitus is a direct instance of type 2 diabetes with a specified treatment characteristic.

scored_codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus without complication (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 1 diabetes mellitus without complication is a direct instance of type 1 diabetes with specified complication status.

scored_codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus without complication (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complication is a direct instance of type 2 diabetes with specified complication status.

scored_codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus with hypoglycemic coma
scored_codes.rationale: Type 1 diabetes with hypoglycemic coma is a direct manifestation of type 1 diabetes mellitus and belongs in a primary diabetes list.

scored_codes.term: Secondary diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Secondary diabetes mellitus is a clinical subtype of diabetes mellitus and represents an instance of the condition.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus with multiple complications (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Diabetes mellitus with multiple complications is a severity variant of diabetes mellitus and should be included in a primary diabetes list.

scored_codes.term: Hyperosmolar non-ketotic state due to type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Hyperosmolar non-ketotic state due to type 2 diabetes is a direct acute complication of type 2 diabetes (term explicitly contains 'type 2 diabetes mellitus') and should be included.

scored_codes.term: Ketoacidosis due to type 1 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Ketoacidosis due to type 1 diabetes is a direct acute complication of type 1 diabetes (term explicitly contains 'type 1 diabetes mellitus') and should be included.

scored_codes.term: Disorder due to type 1 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
